title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・背中に学ぶ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, Special Week is defeated by Seiun
Sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her experience in this race fosters huge
growth within her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week pushes forward towards a new
stage with the pain of her loss still lingering.
